column14: Scaffolds a new DL project — creates folder structure
column16: and initializes a uv project. Run init_project.py from shell for new projects; invoke this skill in Antigravity or to re-scaffold.

column14: Acts as a Domain Expert to frame the ML/DL research problem
column15: define the Research Thesis and PRD
column16: and determine package requirements. Use when starting a new AI model project.

column14: Acts as a Data Scientist to explore the dataset: class distribution
column17: augmentation strategy. Presents findings to Domain Expert for domain interpretation before Architecture.

column14: Acts as an AI Architect to design the model architecture and experiment tracking setup based on the Research Thesis and EDA findings.
Acts as an AI Tech Lead to break down the approved architecture into INF-* (infrastructure) and EXP-* (experiment) tasks.
Acts as Domain Expert and Tech Lead to write the pre-experiment contract: parameter search space
column16: and tiered success criteria. Domain Expert sign-off required. Never modified after training starts.

column14: Acts as AI Developer and MLOps Engineer to build all project infrastructure (data pipeline
column18: inference API). Runs uv sync. Done when smoke test passes with dummy data.

column14: Acts as AI Developer and Data Scientist to execute EXP-* training runs against the locked TECHSPEC. Logs results to W&B/MLflow/ClearML.
Acts as a Data Scientist to analyze experiment results against TECHSPEC tiers and determine HPO eligibility.
Acts as Data Scientist and MLOps Engineer to run hyperparameter optimization (Optuna/W&B Sweeps/Ray Tune/ClearML). Conditional — only after Analysis confirms baseline meets minimum TECHSPEC tier.
Acts as Domain Expert and Tech Lead to audit and amend all upstream documents (Thesis + PRD + Architecture + Detailed Design) and formulate the next experiment hypothesis.
Searches past experiments and retrospectives for validated parameters and failure warnings. Run before starting any new experiment or infrastructure task.
Captures session learnings into the team knowledge base. Run at the end of any implementation or analysis session.
